Child B P2 (V9 jsonschema exit code) is a false positive: actual test shows extra-field input exits 2, valid input exits 0 — fully fail-closed. Remaining P2s (merge-phase out-of-scope write documented in merge-report-wave3.md, N5 function-level assertion) are noted but non-blocking: audit trail exists in merge-report, N5 code path is correctly implemented with fixture-mode exemption. No P0/P1 blocking findings survive adversarial verification.

findings.description: Dead variable diff_text in run_round1 — assigned but never used. No behavioral impact (run_round_n correctly uses diff_text and diff_unavailable). Cosmetic.
_norm_path absolute path edge case: findings with absolute path file field won't match modified_files set. In practice findings use repo-relative paths.
